data.title: China's GDP exceeds expectations thanks to infrastructure spending; Govt investing in new projects as housing prices decline.
data.description: The significant decline in housing prices has led to a decrease in consumer wealth and spending. However, the government is investing heavily in various infrastructure projects, including new rail lines, despite this economic downturn.
China reports that domestic demand contributed the majority of Q1 growth at 84.7%.

data.title: "Oriental Screening Room" Inaugurated in Egypt by Shandong Radio and Television Station and Shandong International Communication Center
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Cairo, Shandian News released a report on the Global Civilization Initiative progress. Shandong Radio and Television Station organized an event in Egypt to inaugurate the "Oriental Screening Room" in support of this initiative. The ceremony marked a significant step in promoting international collaboration.
Stephens lifts price target for Murphy USA Inc to $550, up from $450.
China says the ongoing Middle East tensions may weigh on its exports, according to a stats bureau deputy head.

data.title: 2026 Changzhou Artificial Intelligence Terminal Trendy Products Conference Unveils Latest Innovations
data.description: Taking place in Changshu, China, on April 11th, 2026, the 2026 Changzhou Artificial Intelligence Terminal Trendy Products Conference commenced with the theme "Empowering Devices, Enabling Smarter Living." This event saw the participation of 20 companies, collectively displaying 27 AI-driven devices. The conference served as a platform for showcasing cutting-edge innovations and technologies in the field, with a focus on revolutionizing the way we live through intelligent devices.
